en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID. The heavens declare the glory of God, and the sky above proclaims his handiwork.
zh: 諸天述說 神的榮耀， 穹蒼傳揚他的作為。

en: Day to day pours out speech, and night to night reveals knowledge.
zh: 天天發出言語， 夜夜傳出知識。

en: There is no speech, nor are there words, whose voice is not heard.
zh: 沒有話語，沒有言詞， 人也聽不到它們的聲音。

en: Their measuring line goes out through all the earth, and their words to the end of the world. In them he has set a tent for the sun,
zh: 它們的聲音 傳遍全地， 它們的言語傳到地極， 神在它們中間為太陽安設帳幕。

en: which comes out like a bridegroom leaving his chamber, and, like a strong man, runs its course with joy.
zh: 太陽如同新郎出洞房， 又像勇士歡歡喜喜地跑路。

en: Its rising is from the end of the heavens, and its circuit to the end of them, and there is nothing hidden from its heat.
zh: 它從天的這邊出來， 繞行到天的那邊； 沒有甚麼可以隱藏，得不到它的溫暖。

en: The law of the LORD is perfect, reviving the soul; the testimony of the LORD is sure, making wise the simple;
zh: 耶和華的律法是完全的，能使人心甦醒； 耶和華的法度是堅定的，能使愚人有智慧。

en: the precepts of the LORD are right, rejoicing the heart; the commandment of the LORD is pure, enlightening the eyes;
zh: 耶和華的訓詞是正直的，能使人心快樂； 耶和華的命令是清潔的，能使人的眼睛明亮。

en: the fear of the LORD is clean, enduring forever; the rules of the LORD are true, and righteous altogether.
zh: 耶和華的話語 是潔淨的，能堅立到永遠； 耶和華的典章是真實的，完全公義；

en: More to be desired are they than gold, even much fine gold; sweeter also than honey and drippings of the honeycomb.
zh: 都比金子寶貴，比大量的精金更寶貴； 比蜜甘甜，比蜂房滴下來的蜜更甘甜；

en: Moreover, by them is your servant warned; in keeping them there is great reward.
zh: 並且你的僕人也藉著這些得到警戒， 謹守這些就得著大賞賜。

en: Who can discern his errors? Declare me innocent from hidden faults.
zh: 誰能知道自己的錯誤呢？ 求你赦免我隱而未現的過失。

en: Keep back your servant also from presumptuous sins; let them not have dominion over me! Then I shall be blameless, and innocent of great transgression.
zh: 求你攔阻你僕人，不犯任意妄為的罪， 不許它們轄制我； 我才可以完全，不犯大過。

en: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable in your sight, O LORD, my rock and my redeemer.
zh: 耶和華我的磐石、我的救贖主啊！ 願我口中的言語、心裡的意念， 都在你面前蒙悅納。
